title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Hyundai India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Hyundai India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Hyundai India in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Hyundai India:
Hyundai India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hyundai India!
